message.content:
You are building the backend for CortexBuild Ultimate, a UK construction management app hosted on a VPS at /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate.

Your job: Create the complete Express.js server with PostgreSQL database setup.

## What to build

### 1. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/scripts/setup.sql`
CREATE TABLE statements for ALL these tables (all with `id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()` and `created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()`):

- `users` (id, name, email, password_hash, role VARCHAR CHECK IN ['super_admin','company_owner','admin','project_manager','field_worker','client'], company, phone, avatar, created_at)
- `projects` (id, name, client, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['planning','active','on_hold','completed','archived'], progress INT, budget NUMERIC, spent NUMERIC, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, manager, location, type, phase, workers INT, contract_value NUMERIC, description TEXT, created_at)
- `invoices` (id, number, client, project_id UUID REFERENCES projects, amount NUMERIC, vat NUMERIC, cis_deduction NUMERIC, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['draft','sent','paid','overdue','disputed'], issue_date DATE, due_date DATE, description TEXT, created_at)
- `safety_incidents` (id, type VARCHAR, title, severity VARCHAR CHECK IN ['minor','moderate','serious','fatal'], status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['open','investigating','resolved','closed'], project_id UUID, reported_by, reported_by_name, date DATE, description TEXT, location, root_cause TEXT, corrective_actions TEXT[], injured_party, created_at)
- `rfis` (id, number, project_id UUID, subject, question TEXT, priority VARCHAR CHECK IN ['low','medium','high','critical'], status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['open','answered','closed','pending'], submitted_by, submitted_date DATE, due_date DATE, assigned_to, response TEXT, created_at)
- `change_orders` (id, number, project_id UUID, title, description TEXT, amount NUMERIC, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['draft','pending','approved','rejected'], submitted_date DATE, approved_date DATE, reason TEXT, schedule_impact INT, created_at)
- `team_members` (id, name, role, trade, email, phone, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['active','on_site','off_site','leave','inactive'], cis_status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['gross','net','unverified'], utr_number, ni_number, hours_this_week NUMERIC, rams_completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, created_at)
- `equipment` (id, name, type, registration, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['available','on_site','maintenance','hired_out'], location, next_service DATE, daily_rate NUMERIC, hire_period, created_at)
- `subcontractors` (id, company, trade, contact, email, phone, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['active','inactive','pending'], cis_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, insurance_expiry DATE, rams_approved BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, current_project, contract_value NUMERIC, rating NUMERIC, created_at)
- `documents` (id, name, type, project_id UUID, uploaded_by, version, size, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['current','superseded','draft'], category VARCHAR CHECK IN ['PLANS','DRAWINGS','PERMITS','RAMS','CONTRACTS','REPORTS','SPECS','PHOTOS'], created_at)
- `timesheets` (id, worker_id UUID, worker VARCHAR, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, week DATE, regular_hours NUMERIC, overtime_hours NUMERIC, daywork_hours NUMERIC, total_pay NUMERIC, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['draft','submitted','approved','paid'], cis_deduction NUMERIC, created_at)
- `meetings` (id, title, meeting_type, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, date DATE, time VARCHAR, location, attendees TEXT, agenda TEXT, minutes TEXT, actions TEXT, status VARCHAR, link VARCHAR, created_at)
- `materials` (id, name, category, quantity NUMERIC, unit, unit_cost NUMERIC, total_cost NUMERIC, supplier, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['ordered','delivered','on_site','used'], delivery_date DATE, po_number, created_at)
- `punch_list` (id, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, location, description TEXT, assigned_to, priority VARCHAR CHECK IN ['low','medium','high','critical'], status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['open','in_progress','completed','rejected'], due_date DATE, photos INT DEFAULT 0, trade, created_at)
- `inspections` (id, type, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, inspector, date DATE, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['scheduled','passed','failed','conditional'], score INT, items JSONB DEFAULT '[]', next_inspection DATE, created_at)
- `rams` (id, title, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, activity, version VARCHAR DEFAULT '1.0', status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['draft','review','approved','expired'], created_by, approved_by, review_date DATE, hazards JSONB DEFAULT '[]', method_statement JSONB DEFAULT '[]', ppe JSONB DEFAULT '[]', signatures INT DEFAULT 0, required INT DEFAULT 1, created_at)
- `cis_returns` (id, contractor, utr, period, gross_payment NUMERIC, materials_cost NUMERIC, labour_net NUMERIC, cis_deduction NUMERIC, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['pending','submitted','verified'], verification_status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['gross','net','unverified'], created_at)
- `tenders` (id, title, client, value NUMERIC, deadline DATE, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['drafting','submitted','shortlisted','won','lost'], probability INT, type, location, ai_score INT, notes TEXT, created_at)
- `contacts` (id, name, company, role, email, phone, type VARCHAR CHECK IN ['client','prospect','supplier','subcontractor','consultant'], value NUMERIC DEFAULT 0, last_contact DATE, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['active','dormant','lost'], projects INT DEFAULT 0, created_at)
- `risk_register` (id, title, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, category, likelihood INT, impact INT, risk_score INT, owner, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['open','mitigated','closed','monitoring'], mitigation TEXT, review_date DATE, created_at)
- `purchase_orders` (id, number, supplier, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, amount NUMERIC, status VARCHAR CHECK IN ['draft','sent','confirmed','delivered','cancelled'], order_date DATE, delivery_date DATE, items JSONB DEFAULT '[]', notes TEXT, created_at)
- `daily_reports` (id, project_id UUID, project VARCHAR, date DATE, prepared_by, weather, temperature, workers_on_site INT, activities JSONB DEFAULT '[]', materials JSONB DEFAULT '[]', equipment JSONB DEFAULT '[]', issues JSONB DEFAULT '[]', photos INT DEFAULT 0, progress INT DEFAULT 0, created_at)

### 2. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/scripts/seed.sql`
INSERT statements to seed the database with realistic UK construction data. Include:
- 2 users: `adrian@cortexbuild.co.uk` (company_owner, password hash for 'CortexBuild2024!') and `admin@cortexbuild.co.uk` (admin, same password). Use bcrypt hash: `$2b$10$YourHashHere` — use this literal placeholder for the hash since bcrypt can't run in SQL.
- 5 projects (Canary Wharf Office Complex, Manchester City Apartments, Birmingham Road Bridge, Leeds Warehouse Extension, Bristol Riverside Development)
- 5 invoices
- 5 team members
- 3 safety incidents
- 3 RFIs
- 3 change orders
- 3 equipment items
- 3 subcontractors
- 3 documents
- 3 timesheets
- 3 meetings
- 3 materials
- 3 punch list items
- 3 inspections
- 2 RAMS
- 3 CIS returns
- 3 tenders
- 5 contacts
- 3 risk register items
- 3 purchase orders
- 3 daily reports

Use realistic UK construction data throughout.

### 3. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/package.json`
```json
{
  "name": "cortexbuild-server",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "commonjs",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node index.js",
    "dev": "nodemon index.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "express": "^4.19.2",
    "pg": "^8.11.5",
    "bcrypt": "^5.1.1",
    "jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.2",
    "cors": "^2.8.5",
    "dotenv": "^16.4.5",
    "express-validator": "^7.1.0"
  }
}
```

### 4. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/db.js`
PostgreSQL pool using `pg`. Read from env vars: `DB_HOST`, `DB_PORT`, `DB_NAME`, `DB_USER`, `DB_PASSWORD`. Export the pool.

### 5. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/middleware/auth.js`
JWT verification middleware. Reads `Authorization: Bearer <token>`, verifies with `JWT_SECRET` env var, attaches `req.user` to request. Returns 401 if missing/invalid.

### 6. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/routes/auth.js`
- `POST /login`: find user by email, bcrypt compare, return JWT (24h expiry) with user data
- `GET /me`: protected route, return current user (no password_hash)

### 7. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/routes/generic.js`
A generic route factory function that creates standard CRUD routes for any table:
```js
// Usage: router.use('/projects', makeRouter('projects'))
function makeRouter(tableName) { ... }
```
Implements:
- `GET /` — SELECT * FROM table ORDER BY created_at DESC
- `GET /:id` — SELECT * WHERE id = $1
- `POST /` — INSERT returning *
- `PUT /:id` — UPDATE SET ... WHERE id = $1 returning *
- `DELETE /:id` — DELETE WHERE id = $1

### 8. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/index.js`
Express app that:
- Loads dotenv
- Uses cors (allow all origins in dev)
- Uses express.json()
- Mounts auth middleware on all /api routes except /api/auth/login
- Mounts all route modules under /api/:entity
- Listens on port 3001
- Logs startup message

Routes to mount (use the generic router for all except auth):
- /api/auth → auth routes
- /api/projects, /api/invoices, /api/safety, /api/rfis, /api/change-orders
- /api/team, /api/equipment, /api/subcontractors, /api/documents
- /api/timesheets, /api/meetings, /api/materials, /api/punch-list
- /api/inspections, /api/rams, /api/cis, /api/tenders
- /api/contacts, /api/risk-register, /api/purchase-orders, /api/daily-reports

### 9. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/.env.example`
```
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=cortexbuild
DB_USER=cortexbuild
DB_PASSWORD=your_secure_password_here
JWT_SECRET=your_jwt_secret_here_change_this
PORT=3001
```

### 10. `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/scripts/install.sh`
Bash script that:
1. Installs PostgreSQL if not installed
2. Creates database and user
3. Runs setup.sql
4. Runs seed.sql  
5. npm installs server deps
6. Installs PM2 globally if not present
7. Starts server with PM2
8. Sets up PM2 to start on boot
9. Prints success message with instructions

Write all files now. Be thorough and complete. Do not skip any file.

Let me write all 10 files now.

input.content:
-- CortexBuild Ultimate - Database Setup
-- Run as: psql -U cortexbuild -d cortexbuild -f setup.sql

-- Enable UUID generation
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pgcrypto";

-- ============================================================
-- USERS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name          VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    email         VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    role          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'field_worker'
                  CHECK (role IN ('super_admin','company_owner','admin','project_manager','field_worker','client')),
    company       VARCHAR(255),
    phone         VARCHAR(50),
    avatar        TEXT,
    created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- PROJECTS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
    id             UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    client         VARCHAR(255),
    status         VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'planning'
                   CHECK (status IN ('planning','active','on_hold','completed','archived')),
    progress       INT DEFAULT 0,
    budget         NUMERIC(15,2),
    spent          NUMERIC(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
    start_date     DATE,
    end_date       DATE,
    manager        VARCHAR(255),
    location       VARCHAR(255),
    type           VARCHAR(100),
    phase          VARCHAR(100),
    workers        INT DEFAULT 0,
    contract_value NUMERIC(15,2),
    description    TEXT,
    created_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- INVOICES
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoices (
    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    number          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    client          VARCHAR(255),
    project_id      UUID REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    amount          NUMERIC(15,2),
    vat             NUMERIC(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
    cis_deduction   NUMERIC(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
    status          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                    CHECK (status IN ('draft','sent','paid','overdue','disputed')),
    issue_date      DATE,
    due_date        DATE,
    description     TEXT,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- SAFETY INCIDENTS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS safety_incidents (
    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    type                VARCHAR(100),
    title               VARCHAR(255),
    severity            VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'minor'
                        CHECK (severity IN ('minor','moderate','serious','fatal')),
    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                        CHECK (status IN ('open','investigating','resolved','closed')),
    project_id          UUID,
    reported_by         VARCHAR(255),
    reported_by_name    VARCHAR(255),
    date                DATE,
    description         TEXT,
    location            VARCHAR(255),
    root_cause          TEXT,
    corrective_actions  TEXT[],
    injured_party       VARCHAR(255),
    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- RFIs
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rfis (
    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    number          VARCHAR(50),
    project_id      UUID,
    subject         VARCHAR(255),
    question        TEXT,
    priority        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium'
                    CHECK (priority IN ('low','medium','high','critical')),
    status          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                    CHECK (status IN ('open','answered','closed','pending')),
    submitted_by    VARCHAR(255),
    submitted_date  DATE,
    due_date        DATE,
    assigned_to     VARCHAR(255),
    response        TEXT,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- CHANGE ORDERS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS change_orders (
    id               UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    number           VARCHAR(50),
    project_id       UUID,
    title            VARCHAR(255),
    description      TEXT,
    amount           NUMERIC(15,2),
    status           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                     CHECK (status IN ('draft','pending','approved','rejected')),
    submitted_date   DATE,
    approved_date    DATE,
    reason           TEXT,
    schedule_impact  INT DEFAULT 0,
    created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- TEAM MEMBERS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS team_members (
    id               UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name             VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    role             VARCHAR(100),
    trade            VARCHAR(100),
    email            VARCHAR(255),
    phone            VARCHAR(50),
    status           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'
                     CHECK (status IN ('active','on_site','off_site','leave','inactive')),
    cis_status       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unverified'
                     CHECK (cis_status IN ('gross','net','unverified')),
    utr_number       VARCHAR(50),
    ni_number        VARCHAR(20),
    hours_this_week  NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
    rams_completed   BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- EQUIPMENT
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS equipment (
    id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name          VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    type          VARCHAR(100),
    registration  VARCHAR(50),
    status        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available'
                  CHECK (status IN ('available','on_site','maintenance','hired_out')),
    location      VARCHAR(255),
    next_service  DATE,
    daily_rate    NUMERIC(10,2),
    hire_period   VARCHAR(100),
    created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- SUBCONTRACTORS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subcontractors (
    id                UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    company           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    trade             VARCHAR(100),
    contact           VARCHAR(255),
    email             VARCHAR(255),
    phone             VARCHAR(50),
    status            VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
                      CHECK (status IN ('active','inactive','pending')),
    cis_verified      BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    insurance_expiry  DATE,
    rams_approved     BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    current_project   VARCHAR(255),
    contract_value    NUMERIC(15,2),
    rating            NUMERIC(3,1),
    created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- DOCUMENTS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documents (
    id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name         VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    type         VARCHAR(100),
    project_id   UUID,
    uploaded_by  VARCHAR(255),
    version      VARCHAR(20),
    size         VARCHAR(50),
    status       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'current'
                 CHECK (status IN ('current','superseded','draft')),
    category     VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'REPORTS'
                 CHECK (category IN ('PLANS','DRAWINGS','PERMITS','RAMS','CONTRACTS','REPORTS','SPECS','PHOTOS')),
    created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- TIMESHEETS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS timesheets (
    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    worker_id       UUID,
    worker          VARCHAR(255),
    project_id      UUID,
    project         VARCHAR(255),
    week            DATE,
    regular_hours   NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
    overtime_hours  NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
    daywork_hours   NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
    total_pay       NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
    status          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                    CHECK (status IN ('draft','submitted','approved','paid')),
    cis_deduction   NUMERIC(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- MEETINGS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meetings (
    id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    title         VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    meeting_type  VARCHAR(100),
    project_id    UUID,
    project       VARCHAR(255),
    date          DATE,
    time          VARCHAR(20),
    location      VARCHAR(255),
    attendees     TEXT,
    agenda        TEXT,
    minutes       TEXT,
    actions       TEXT,
    status        VARCHAR(50),
    link          VARCHAR(500),
    created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- MATERIALS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS materials (
    id             UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name           VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    category       VARCHAR(100),
    quantity       NUMERIC(12,3),
    unit           VARCHAR(50),
    unit_cost      NUMERIC(12,2),
    total_cost     NUMERIC(15,2),
    supplier       VARCHAR(255),
    project_id     UUID,
    project        VARCHAR(255),
    status         VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ordered'
                   CHECK (status IN ('ordered','delivered','on_site','used')),
    delivery_date  DATE,
    po_number      VARCHAR(100),
    created_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- PUNCH LIST
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS punch_list (
    id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    project_id   UUID,
    project      VARCHAR(255),
    location     VARCHAR(255),
    description  TEXT,
    assigned_to  VARCHAR(255),
    priority     VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium'
                 CHECK (priority IN ('low','medium','high','critical')),
    status       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                 CHECK (status IN ('open','in_progress','completed','rejected')),
    due_date     DATE,
    photos       INT DEFAULT 0,
    trade        VARCHAR(100),
    created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- INSPECTIONS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inspections (
    id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    type            VARCHAR(100),
    project_id      UUID,
    project         VARCHAR(255),
    inspector       VARCHAR(255),
    date            DATE,
    status          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled'
                    CHECK (status IN ('scheduled','passed','failed','conditional')),
    score           INT,
    items           JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    next_inspection DATE,
    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- RAMS (Risk Assessments & Method Statements)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rams (
    id                UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    title             VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    project_id        UUID,
    project           VARCHAR(255),
    activity          VARCHAR(255),
    version           VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '1.0',
    status            VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                      CHECK (status IN ('draft','review','approved','expired')),
    created_by        VARCHAR(255),
    approved_by       VARCHAR(255),
    review_date       DATE,
    hazards           JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    method_statement  JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    ppe               JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    signatures        INT DEFAULT 0,
    required          INT DEFAULT 1,
    created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- CIS RETURNS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cis_returns (
    id                   UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    contractor           VARCHAR(255),
    utr                  VARCHAR(20),
    period               VARCHAR(50),
    gross_payment        NUMERIC(15,2),
    materials_cost       NUMERIC(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
    labour_net           NUMERIC(15,2),
    cis_deduction        NUMERIC(15,2),
    status               VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
                         CHECK (status IN ('pending','submitted','verified')),
    verification_status  VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unverified'
                         CHECK (verification_status IN ('gross','net','unverified')),
    created_at           TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- TENDERS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenders (
    id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    title        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    client       VARCHAR(255),
    value        NUMERIC(15,2),
    deadline     DATE,
    status       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'drafting'
                 CHECK (status IN ('drafting','submitted','shortlisted','won','lost')),
    probability  INT DEFAULT 0,
    type         VARCHAR(100),
    location     VARCHAR(255),
    ai_score     INT DEFAULT 0,
    notes        TEXT,
    created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- CONTACTS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contacts (
    id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    name          VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    company       VARCHAR(255),
    role          VARCHAR(100),
    email         VARCHAR(255),
    phone         VARCHAR(50),
    type          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'client'
                  CHECK (type IN ('client','prospect','supplier','subcontractor','consultant')),
    value         NUMERIC(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
    last_contact  DATE,
    status        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'
                  CHECK (status IN ('active','dormant','lost')),
    projects      INT DEFAULT 0,
    created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- RISK REGISTER
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_register (
    id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    title        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    project_id   UUID,
    project      VARCHAR(255),
    category     VARCHAR(100),
    likelihood   INT CHECK (likelihood BETWEEN 1 AND 5),
    impact       INT CHECK (impact BETWEEN 1 AND 5),
    risk_score   INT,
    owner        VARCHAR(255),
    status       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                 CHECK (status IN ('open','mitigated','closed','monitoring')),
    mitigation   TEXT,
    review_date  DATE,
    created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- PURCHASE ORDERS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchase_orders (
    id             UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    number         VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    supplier       VARCHAR(255),
    project_id     UUID,
    project        VARCHAR(255),
    amount         NUMERIC(15,2),
    status         VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                   CHECK (status IN ('draft','sent','confirmed','delivered','cancelled')),
    order_date     DATE,
    delivery_date  DATE,
    items          JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    notes          TEXT,
    created_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ============================================================
-- DAILY REPORTS
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS daily_reports (
    id               UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    project_id       UUID,
    project          VARCHAR(255),
    date             DATE,
    prepared_by      VARCHAR(255),
    weather          VARCHAR(100),
    temperature      VARCHAR(20),
    workers_on_site  INT DEFAULT 0,
    activities       JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    materials        JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    equipment        JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    issues           JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
    photos           INT DEFAULT 0,
    progress         INT DEFAULT 0,
    created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

I need both Bash and Write permissions to create these files. Currently both are denied. Here's what I need to do and why:

**What I was trying to do:**
1. **Bash** — create the required directories (`/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/scripts`, `/server/middleware`, `/server/routes`) since they don't exist yet.
2. **Write** — create all 10 files with their complete contents (setup.sql, seed.sql, package.json, db.js, middleware/auth.js, routes/auth.js, routes/generic.js, index.js, .env.example, scripts/install.sh).

**Why these permissions are needed:**
- The `/var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/server/` directory does not exist yet, so I cannot write any files until it (and its subdirectories) are created.
- All 10 files must be written fresh — there are no existing files to edit.

**To proceed, please grant:**
- **Bash** permission (to run `mkdir -p` for the directory structure)
- **Write** permission (to create all 10 new files)

Once you grant these, I will immediately create the full directory tree and write all 10 files completely and correctly.
